testcase.name: test_root_health
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_group_chat_api.py:64: in test_root_health assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_register_user1
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_group_chat_api.py:76: in test_register_user1 assert response.status_code == 200, f"Registration failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Registration failed: {"detail":"Username must be alphanumeric"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_register_user2
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_group_chat_api.py:92: in test_register_user2 assert response.status_code == 200, f"Registration failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Registration failed: {"detail":"Username must be alphanumeric"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_success
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_group_chat_api.py:122: in test_login_success assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_check_username_taken
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_group_chat_api.py:160: in test_check_username_taken assert data["available"] == False E assert True == False

testcase.name: test_get_user_by_id
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_group_chat_api.py:169: in test_get_user_by_id response = api_client.get(f"{BASE_URL}/api/users/{TEST_USER_1['id']}") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'id'
